name: Vicon Holdings Limited
summary: Vicon Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides foundation works and related services in Hong Kong and Macau. The company undertakes piling construction, ELS, and pile cap construction works, as well as general building works. It serves property developers, and project owners and their contractors, as well as public sectors. Vicon Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong.
